title: Classification of traveling wave solutions of the modified Zakharov--Kuznetsov equation
summary: The $\mathcal{C}^{\infty}$-structure-based method of integration of distributions of vector fields is used to classify all the traveling wave solutions of the modified Zakharov--Kuznetsov equation. This work unifies and generalizes the particular results obtained in the recent literature by using specific ansatz-based methods.
